title: Neuro and Evil Allays
description: A resource pack to dress the allays and vexes as Neuro-sama and Evil Neuro, complete with sounds.
body:
Replaces the textures and sounds of the allays and vexes with Neuro-sama and Evil Neuro, respectively.

Neuro-sama replaces the allays and has fresh animations compatibility so you can see her happily hold a cookie! The usual sounds of the allay are softened and overlayed with sound clips of Neuro-sama.

Evil Neuro replaces the vexes (which can be used in either vanilla or fresh animations since vexes were not changed) and typically holds a sword. When charging at an enemy, her face will turn dark red, similar to the vanilla vexes. The usual vex sounds are a lot less annoying since Evil Neuro replaces them with her taunts and laughs.

**This pack is free to use for any videos, projects, or just personal use. Just don't redistribute it to other platforms, link this page instead! Don't use this for commercial use since Mojang's EULA prevents that.**

Credits: 

Concepts of Neuro-sama and Evil Neuro: Vedal987.

Reference Audio Clips: CJMAXiK @ nuero.fun & Neuro-sama Discord.
